training_status: Walking with brisk intervals and uphill trails around Lady Bird Lake

benefits.description: Food noise dropped within first month; felt in control of appetite; went from 2 meals per day to 1 main meal in a 90 minute window; portion sizes came down naturally; fullness kicked in earlier

side_effects.description: Some nausea the first week after bumping up dose, described as mild; resolved once stabilized

protocol_notes: Started at 3 mg weekly, titrated up to 5 mg after about 6 weeks, now steady at 8 mg. Ordered from a US supplier with BAC water and syringes. Tracking protocol with PepTracker app for dose scheduling, site rotation, and trend monitoring. Diet consists of lean proteins, vegetables, and some carbs. Asking about maintenance dosing strategy.
